final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale e-commerce campaign.

Style/medium: clean digital illustration with bold graphic design, flat vector elements mixed with soft gradient accents, inspired by modern Chinese e-commerce visual language (JD / Tmall flagship store aesthetic)
Composition: vertical portrait layout, centered hero zone with large bold headline at top, product/brand visual in mid-section, CTA banner at bottom, generous breathing room between zones
Subject: 绿联私有云 brand identity as focal point — private cloud storage device rendered in sleek metallic finish, surrounded by celebratory 618 anniversary graphic elements (burst rays, ribbon accents, floating discount badges)
Scene/backdrop: deep tech-blue to vibrant green gradient background evoking digital cloud space, subtle circuit-line texture at low opacity
Lighting/mood: bright front-lit product highlight, festive and energetic mood, confident tech-brand authority
Color palette: 绿联 signature green as dominant brand anchor, electric blue as supporting tech tone, gold/yellow as celebration accent for 618 numerals, white for text legibility
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云" "618" "周年庆"
Constraints: text must be legible at thumbnail size (300×400 px preview); hierarchy — brand name largest, "618" second, tagline third; poster must read as a single coherent composition without visual clutter
Avoid: generic stock-photo collage style, overly busy confetti explosion, mismatched font weights, drop-shadow spam, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
